name: MrScraper
description: A scraping platform that provides a RESTful API and SDKs to create and run web scrapes, manage projects, and retrieve results.

auth_methods.note: Official docs state MrScraper authenticates requests using an API key created in the dashboard and sent in the Authorization header as a Bearer token ("Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_API_KEY>").

credential_access.note: Getting Started docs instruct users to sign up at dashboard.mrscraper.com and create an API key in the dashboard (self-serve credential issuance). The fetched docs do not confirm paid trial/plan requirements.

api_surface.note: Mrscraper exposes a RESTful HTTP API covering projects, scrapes, billing, SDKs, and webhooks; many core product objects are represented in the API reference.

buildability.note: Docs confirm self-serve signup and API key creation in the dashboard and show how to authenticate requests with an API key. However, the fetched primary sources do not confirm whether long-term usage is paid-only; monetization is not verified from the fetched docs.

queries: Mrscraper developer docs REST API reference
